<!doctype html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="dark">
  <head>
    <script>
      (function (g, d) {
        var path = (g.location && g.location.pathname) || "/";
        var root = path === "/" ? "" : path.replace(/\/$/, "");
        if (root === "/") root = "";
        g.__ROOT_PATH = root;
        g.QCVIZ_API_PREFIX = root;
        d.write('<base href="' + (root || "") + '/">');
      })(window,
